meaning: v.交换,抵偿,减刑,<电工>整流
examples: So how long is your commute?
People are prepared to commute long distances if they are desperate for work.
They were asked to predict whether they'd enjoy the commute more if they conversed with other people.
Her hour-long commute to the small village of Perajin Mariana was down a long and bumpy road.
Choose one activity from your daily routine: showering, your commute, brushing your teeth, drinking coffee.
